inputs.label: Initial Investment
inputs.businessContext: Total upfront capital expenditure required to start the project.

inputs.label: Annual Cash Inflows
inputs.businessContext: Expected yearly benefits or revenue generated by the project.

inputs.label: Annual Operating Costs
inputs.businessContext: Recurring costs for operation, maintenance, labor, and materials.

inputs.label: Project Life
inputs.businessContext: Anticipated useful lifespan of the investment.

inputs.label: Discount Rate
inputs.businessContext: Required rate of return or cost of capital used to discount future cash flows.

primary.label: Benefit-Cost Ratio (BCR)
primary.description: Ratio of total discounted benefits to total discounted costs. Values > 1 indicate a financially viable project.

breakdown.label: Present Value of Benefits
breakdown.description: Sum of discounted annual benefits over the project life.

breakdown.label: Total Present Value of Costs
breakdown.description: Initial cost plus discounted annual operating costs.
